summary: Completed testing of NASSAQ School Management System - TenantsManagement RTL layout, UsersManagement page with 6 statistics cards, user cards with action buttons, and integrated teacher requests tab. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Backend API Tests - ✓ ALL 14 TESTS PASSED
- TestAuthentication: login_success, login_invalid_credentials
- TestUserCreation: create_teacher_with_all_fields, create_platform_operations_manager, create_user_duplicate_email, create_user_invalid_role, create_user_unauthenticated
- TestPlatformUsers: get_platform_users, get_platform_users_with_role_filter, get_platform_users_with_search, get_platform_users_unauthenticated
- TestDashboardStats: get_dashboard_stats
- TestRegistrationRequests: get_registration_requests, get_pending_requests
2. TenantsManagement Page - RTL Layout - ✓ PASS
- Add School button positioned on the RIGHT side (x=1355) - correct for RTL
- Combined stats card showing: Total Schools (6), Active (4), Setup (1), Suspended (1), Expired (0)
- 6-column grid layout for school cards working
- School cards display: name, code, type, stage, AI badge, health score, teachers, students, city, principal, last activity
3. UsersManagement Page - Statistics Cards - ✓ PASS
- 6 statistics cards in grid layout (grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-6)
- Cards showing: إجمالي المستخدمين (10), إجمالي المدارس (6), معلمين داخل المدارس (3), معلمين مستقلين (2), حسابات المنصة (5), طلبات معلقة (3)
4. UsersManagement Page - User Cards - ✓ PASS
- 10 user cards displayed with visible action buttons
- Each card shows: avatar, name, role badge, status badge, AI badge, email, phone, school/department, last login, creation date
- Action buttons visible: عرض (view), تعليق (suspend), تعديل (edit), حذف (delete), إشعار (notify)
- All action buttons have data-testid attributes
5. UsersManagement Page - Tabs - ✓ PASS
- 2 tabs: المستخدمين (Users) and طلبات المعلمين (Teacher Requests)
- Tab switching works correctly (URL stays at /admin/users)
- Pending requests badge (3) shown on Teacher Requests tab
6. Teacher Requests Tab - ✓ PASS
- Shows 3 pending teacher requests with detailed cards
- Each request shows: name, status, national ID, phone, email, subject, education level, school mentioned, request date
- Action buttons: موافقة (Approve), رفض (Reject), طلب معلومات (Request Info)
7. Login Flow - ✓ PASS
- Admin login with info@nassaqapp.com works correctly
- Token-based authentication working
- Navigation to admin pages after login successful
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_users_management.py - Created new test file for users management APIs
seed_data_creation: Created test users during API testing (test_teacher_*, test_ops_*, test_dup_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) TenantsManagement has RTL layout with Add School button on right, combined stats card, and 6-column grid for school cards. 2) UsersManagement has 6 statistics cards, user cards with 5 visible action buttons (view, suspend, edit, delete, notify), and integrated teacher requests tab with approve/reject/info buttons. Mock data is used for demo when no real users exist (generateMockUsers, generateMockTeacherRequests).

mocked_apis_list: generateMockUsers() - Used in UsersManagement when API returns empty users
generateMockTeacherRequests() - Used for demo teacher requests
mocked_apis.note: Mock data is fallback for demo purposes when real data is not available

tenants_management_rtl.stats_card: Combined card showing all statuses (Active, Setup, Suspended, Expired)

users_management_cards.data_testid_pattern: user-card-{id}, view-user-{id}, suspend-user-{id}, edit-user-{id}, delete-user-{id}, notify-user-{id}

teacher_requests_tab.request_cards: Shows pending requests with full details
